card_description: K.W. is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick proposes a staggering "solution" to his experiences: it is actually still ~90 AD, and the last 2000 years of history is a "lie" or "delusion" generated by Satan/the Empire to break human faith."
